panels.title: Data Freshness
panels.description: Time since last record. Only alerts during market hours (9-15 ICT, Mon-Fri).

targets.rawSql: WITH market AS (SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') IN (0,6) THEN false WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') >= 9 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') < 15 THEN true ELSE false END as is_open), freshness AS (SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(timestamp)))::int as secs FROM market_data_hot) SELECT CASE WHEN m.is_open THEN f.secs ELSE -1 END as "Seconds Ago" FROM market m, freshness f
SELECT COUNT(*) as "Records" FROM market_data_hot WHERE timestamp >= (SELECT date_trunc('day', MAX(timestamp)) FROM market_data_hot)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) || '/30' as "Symbols" FROM market_data_hot WHERE timestamp >= (SELECT date_trunc('day', MAX(timestamp)) FROM market_data_hot)

panels.title: Ingestion Rate (per minute) — Trading Hours Only

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', timestamp) as time, COUNT(*) as "Messages/min" FROM market_data_hot WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') >= 9 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') < 15 AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') NOT IN (0,6) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT symbol, COUNT(*) as "Records" FROM market_data_hot WHERE timestamp >= (SELECT date_trunc('day', MAX(timestamp)) FROM market_data_hot) GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY symbol

panels.title: Missing Symbols (Last Session)
panels.description: Symbols with no data in last trading session

targets.rawSql: WITH last_session AS (SELECT date_trunc('day', MAX(timestamp)) as session_start FROM market_data_hot), all_symbols AS (SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM market_data_hot), recent AS (SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM market_data_hot WHERE timestamp >= (SELECT session_start FROM last_session)) SELECT a.symbol as "Missing Symbol", MAX(m.timestamp) as "Last Seen" FROM all_symbols a LEFT JOIN recent r ON a.symbol=r.symbol LEFT JOIN market_data_hot m ON a.symbol=m.symbol WHERE r.symbol IS NULL GROUP BY a.symbol ORDER BY "Last Seen" DESC

panels.title: Ingestion Timeline by Symbol — Trading Hours Only

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', timestamp) as time, symbol, COUNT(*) as records FROM market_data_hot WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') >= 9 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') < 15 AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') NOT IN (0,6) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
